name: Voluminous Peach Cobbler
recipeInstructions:
Filling:
1. C Dried peaches, soaked for 1 hour in 1/2 cup water
1. C Pitted dates, soaked for 1 hour in 1/2 cup water
5 md Bananas, peeled
1/2 c Shredded coconut
12 Fresh peaches, pits removed
2 c Black raspberries
2 ts Grated lemon peel
Crust:
Sprinkle coconut evenly over the bottom of a 9" X 12" pan.
Filling:
Drain the soaked fruit, reserving the water. Puree the soaked peaches in a food processor or blender, adding a little soak water as necessary. Pour into a large bowl. Mash the bananas and coconut with a fork. Spread over the crust. Slice the fresh peaches and scatter over the top. Blend 1 1/2 cups berries with dates and lemon peel in a food processor or blender until smooth. Mix in the remaining berries. Pour over the top of the pie and spread evenly. Serve immediately.
Variation:
Substitute black raspberries with strawberries and slice those that are not blended before mixing in.
